purpose: A dropdown control allowing the user to choose one option from a list of 4–12 mutually exclusive items. Compact alternative to RadioButton group.
whenToUse: When all options should be visible on demand
When the choice does not need search/filter
whenNotToUse: Use ComboBox when >12 options or search is needed
doRules: Use Select when 4–12 mutually exclusive options exist
Use a clear default value when applicable
Pair every Select with a Label
dontRules: Do not use Select with fewer than 3 options — use RadioButton
Do not use Select with more than 12 options — use ComboBox with search
Do not nest Select inside Select

layoutGuidance.alignment: Left-aligned with Label above or to the left.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Enter/Space opens dropdown; arrow keys traverse options
Visible focus ring on closed state; option focus visible when open

exceptions: When options have icons, use Select with icon+text variant
